tools.name: search_employee
tools.description:
Find employees corresponding with sent data.

API: GET /employee

tools.name: post_employee
tools.description:
Create one employee.

API: POST /employee

usesAbroadPayment.description: UsesAbroadPayment field. Determines if we should use domestic or abroad remittance. To be able to use abroad remittance, one has to: 1: have Autopay 2: have valid combination of the fields Iban, Bic (swift) and Country of creditor bank.

userType.description:
Define the employee's user type.
STANDARD: Reduced access. Users with limited system entitlements.
EXTENDED: Users can be given all system entitlements.
NO_ACCESS: User with no log on access.
Users with access to Tripletex must confirm the email address.

isContact.description: Determines if the employee is a contact (external) in the company.

tools.name: put_employee
tools.description:
Update employee.

API: PUT /employee/{id}

usesAbroadPayment.description: UsesAbroadPayment field. Determines if we should use domestic or abroad remittance. To be able to use abroad remittance, one has to: 1: have Autopay 2: have valid combination of the fields Iban, Bic (swift) and Country of creditor bank.

userType.description:
Define the employee's user type.
STANDARD: Reduced access. Users with limited system entitlements.
EXTENDED: Users can be given all system entitlements.
NO_ACCESS: User with no log on access.
Users with access to Tripletex must confirm the email address.

isContact.description: Determines if the employee is a contact (external) in the company.

tools.name: search_department
tools.description:
Find department corresponding with sent data.

API: GET /department

isInactive.description: true - return only inactive departments; false - return only active departments; unspecified - return both types

tools.name: post_department
tools.description:
Add new department.

API: POST /department

tools.name: search_customer
tools.description:
Find customers corresponding with sent data.

API: GET /customer

changedSince.description: Only return elements that have changed since this date and time

tools.name: post_customer
tools.description:
Create customer. Related customer addresses may also be created.

API: POST /customer

isSupplier.description: Defines if the customer is also a supplier.

overdueNoticeEmail.description: The email address of the customer where the noticing emails are sent in case of an overdue

singleCustomerInvoice.description: Enables various orders on one customer invoice.

invoiceSendMethod.description:
Define the invoicing method for the customer.
EMAIL: Send invoices as email.
EHF: Send invoices as EHF.
EFAKTURA: Send invoices as EFAKTURA.
AVTALEGIRO: Send invoices as AVTALEGIRO.
VIPPS: Send invoices through VIPPS.
PAPER: Send invoices as paper invoice.
MANUAL: User will have to send invocie manually.

invoicesDueIn.description: Number of days/months in which invoices created from this customer is due

invoicesDueInType.description: Set the time unit of invoicesDueIn. The special case RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH enables the due date to be fixed to a specific day of the month, in this case the fixed due date will automatically be set as standard on all invoices created from this customer. Note that when RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH is set, the due date will be set to the last day of month if "31" is set in invoicesDueIn.

tools.name: put_customer
tools.description:
Update customer. 

API: PUT /customer/{id}

isSupplier.description: Defines if the customer is also a supplier.

overdueNoticeEmail.description: The email address of the customer where the noticing emails are sent in case of an overdue

singleCustomerInvoice.description: Enables various orders on one customer invoice.

invoiceSendMethod.description:
Define the invoicing method for the customer.
EMAIL: Send invoices as email.
EHF: Send invoices as EHF.
EFAKTURA: Send invoices as EFAKTURA.
AVTALEGIRO: Send invoices as AVTALEGIRO.
VIPPS: Send invoices through VIPPS.
PAPER: Send invoices as paper invoice.
MANUAL: User will have to send invocie manually.

invoicesDueIn.description: Number of days/months in which invoices created from this customer is due

invoicesDueInType.description: Set the time unit of invoicesDueIn. The special case RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH enables the due date to be fixed to a specific day of the month, in this case the fixed due date will automatically be set as standard on all invoices created from this customer. Note that when RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH is set, the due date will be set to the last day of month if "31" is set in invoicesDueIn.

tools.name: search_contact
tools.description:
Find contacts corresponding with sent data.

API: GET /contact

tools.name: post_contact
tools.description:
Create contact.

API: POST /contact

tools.name: search_product
tools.description:
Find products corresponding with sent data.

API: GET /product

productNumber.description: Product number to search for (single value)

tools.name: post_product
tools.description:
Create new product.

API: POST /product

costExcludingVatCurrency.description: Price purchase (cost) excluding VAT in the product's currency

priceExcludingVatCurrency.description: Price of purchase excluding VAT in the product's currency

priceIncludingVatCurrency.description: Price of purchase including VAT in the product's currency

isDeletable.description: For performance reasons, field is deprecated and it will always return false.

minStockLevel.description: Minimum available stock level for the product. Applicable only to stock items in the Logistics Basics module.

tools.name: post_order
tools.description:
Create order.

API: POST /order

invoiceComment.description: Comment to be displayed in the invoice based on this order. Can be also found in Invoice.invoiceComment on Invoice objects.

invoicesDueIn.description: Number of days/months in which invoices created from this order is due

invoicesDueInType.description: Set the time unit of invoicesDueIn. The special case RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH enables the due date to be fixed to a specific day of the month, in this case the fixed due date will automatically be set as standard on all invoices created from this order. Note that when RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH is set, the due date will be set to the last day of month if "31" is set in invoicesDueIn.

orderLines.description: Order lines tied to the order. New OrderLines may be embedded here, in some endpoints.

items.description: A single order line within the order

product_id.description: Product ID (optional, can use description instead)

unitPriceExcludingVatCurrency.description: Unit price excl. VAT in order currency

unitPriceIncludingVatCurrency.description: Unit price incl. VAT in order currency

discountPercentage.description: Default discount percentage for order lines.

tools.name: invoice_order
tools.description:
Create new invoice or subscription invoice from order.

API: PUT /order/{id}/:invoice

sendType.description: Send type used for sending the invoice

paymentTypeId.description: Payment type to register prepayment of the invoice. paymentTypeId and paidAmount are optional, but both must be provided if the invoice has already been paid. The payment type must be related to an account with the same currency as the invoice.

paidAmount.description: Paid amount to register prepayment of the invoice, in invoice currency. paymentTypeId and paidAmount are optional, but both must be provided if the invoice has already been paid. This amount is in the invoice currency.

paidAmountAccountCurrency.description: Amount paid in payment type currency

paymentTypeIdRestAmount.description: Payment type of rest amount. It is possible to have two prepaid payments when invoicing. If paymentTypeIdRestAmount > 0, this second payment will be calculated as invoice amount - paidAmount

paidAmountAccountCurrencyRest.description: Amount rest in payment type currency

createBackorder.description: Create a backorder for this order, available only for pilot users

invoiceIdIfIsCreditNote.description: Id of the invoice a credit note refers to

overrideEmailAddress.description: Will override email address if sendType = EMAIL

tools.name: search_invoice
tools.description:
Find invoices corresponding with sent data. Includes charged outgoing invoices only.

API: GET /invoice

tools.name: payment_invoice
tools.description:
Update invoice. The invoice is updated with payment information. The amount is in the invoice’s currency.

API: PUT /invoice/{id}/:payment

paidAmount.description: Amount paid by the customer in the currency determined by the account of the paymentType

paidAmountCurrency.description: Amount paid by customer in the invoice currency. Optional, but required for invoices in alternate currencies.

tools.name: createCreditNote_invoice
tools.description:
Creates a new Invoice representing a credit memo that nullifies the given invoice. Updates this invoice and any pre-existing inverse invoice.

API: PUT /invoice/{id}/:createCreditNote

creditNoteEmail.description: The credit note will not be sent if the customer send type is email and this field is empty

tools.name: send_invoice
tools.description:
Send invoice by ID and sendType. Optionally override email recipient.

API: PUT /invoice/{id}/:send

overrideEmailAddress.description: Will override email address if sendType = EMAIL

tools.name: search_travelExpense
tools.description:
Find travel expenses corresponding with sent data.

API: GET /travelExpense

tools.name: post_travelExpense
tools.description:
Create travel expense.

API: POST /travelExpense

perDiemCompensations.description: Link to individual per diem compensations.

tools.name: delete_travelExpense
tools.description:
Delete travel expense.

API: DELETE /travelExpense/{id}

tools.name: post_travelExpense_cost
tools.description:
Create cost.

API: POST /travelExpense/cost

tools.name: delete_travelExpense_cost
tools.description:
Delete cost.

API: DELETE /travelExpense/cost/{id}

tools.name: search_travelExpense_paymentType
tools.description:
Find payment type corresponding with sent data.

API: GET /travelExpense/paymentType

tools.name: search_travelExpense_costCategory
tools.description:
Find cost category corresponding with sent data.

API: GET /travelExpense/costCategory

tools.name: search_project
tools.description:
Find projects corresponding with sent data.

API: GET /project

includeRecentlyClosed.description: If isClosed is false, include projects that have been closed within the last 3 months. Equals

tools.name: post_project
tools.description:
Add new project.

API: POST /project

number.description: If NULL, a number is generated automatically.

isOffer.description: If is Project Offer set to true, if is Project set to false. The default value is false.

isFixedPrice.description: Project is fixed price if set to true, hourly rate if set to false.

fixedprice.description: Fixed price amount, in the project's currency.

isPriceCeiling.description: Set to true if an hourly rate project has a price ceiling.

priceCeilingAmount.description: Price ceiling amount, in the project's currency.

invoiceDueDateType.description: Set the time unit of invoiceDueDate. The special case RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH enables the due date to be fixed to a specific day of the month, in this case the fixed due date will automatically be set as standard on all invoices created from this project. Note that when RECURRING_DAY_OF_MONTH is set, the due date will be set to the last day of month if "31" is set in invoicesDueIn.

invoiceReceiverEmail.description: Set the project's invoice receiver email. Will override the default invoice receiver email of any customer that may also be set in the request body.

tools.name: search_ledger_voucher
tools.description:
Find vouchers corresponding with sent data.

API: GET /ledger/voucher

tools.name: post_ledger_voucher
tools.description:
Add new voucher. IMPORTANT: Also creates postings. Only the gross amounts will be used. Amounts should be rounded to 2 decimals.

API: POST /ledger/voucher

sendToLedger.description: Should the voucher be sent to ledger? Requires the "Advanced Voucher" permission.

postings.description: Array of Posting objects (each needs at minimum an 'id' field, or full object for creation)

items.description: A single posting/journal line within the voucher

amountGross.description: Gross amount incl. VAT in NOK (use positive for debit, negative for credit)

amountGrossCurrency.description: Gross amount in foreign currency (if applicable)

date.description: Posting date (YYYY-MM-DD), defaults to voucher date

tools.name: delete_ledger_voucher
tools.description:
Delete voucher by ID.

API: DELETE /ledger/voucher/{id}

tools.name: search_ledger_account
tools.description:
Find accounts corresponding with sent data.

API: GET /ledger/account

tools.name: get_company
tools.description:
Find company by ID.

API: GET /company/{id}

tools.name: get_company_withLoginAccess
tools.description:
Returns client customers (with accountant/auditor relation) where the current user has login access (proxy login).

API: GET /company/>withLoginAccess

tools.name: search_invoice_paymentType
tools.description:
Find payment type corresponding with sent data.

API: GET /invoice/paymentType

tools.name: grantEntitlementsByTemplate_employee_entitlement
tools.description:
[BETA] Update employee entitlements.

API: PUT /employee/entitlement/:grantEntitlementsByTemplate

tools.name: search_supplier
tools.description:
Find suppliers corresponding with sent data.

API: GET /supplier

changedSince.description: Only return elements that have changed since this date and time

tools.name: post_supplier
tools.description:
Create supplier. Related supplier addresses may also be created.

API: POST /supplier

bankAccounts.description: [DEPRECATED] List of the bank account numbers for this supplier. Norwegian bank account numbers only.

tools.name: post_incomingInvoice
tools.description:
[BETA] create an invoice

API: POST /incomingInvoice

invoiceDate.description: The date the invoice was issued.

dueDate.description: The date the invoice is due.

purchaseOrderId.description: The purchase order that the invoice belongs to.

orderLines.description: Array of IncomingOrderLineExternalWrite objects (each needs at minimum an 'id' field, or full object for creation)

items.description: A single line on the supplier invoice

externalId.description: REQUIRED. Unique external ID for this line (use 'line1', 'line2', etc.)

accountId.description: Ledger account ID (e.g. 6300 for office services)

vatTypeId.description: VAT type ID (5=25% incoming/inngående MVA, 6=exempt, 31=15% food)

amountInclVat.description: Line amount INCLUDING VAT in invoice currency

showInVoucherRegistration.description: Only values shown in voucher registration

tools.name: createReminder_invoice
tools.description:
Create invoice reminder (purring).

API: PUT /invoice/{id}/:createReminder

tools.name: put_project

version.description: REQUIRED for PUT. Get from search_project response. Optimistic locking version.

isFixedPrice.description: Project is fixed price if set to true, hourly rate if set to false.

fixedprice.description: Fixed price amount, in the project currency.
